target.title: docs: note LanceDB dreaming v0.2.3 via memory-lancedb-dreaming plugin
target.body:
## Summary

Documents that built-in dreaming may not work with LanceDB vector stores, and points LanceDB users to the community plugin `memory-lancedb-dreaming` v0.2.3 (ClawHub + GitHub).

Updated from the previously closed PR #86349 — version bumped to v0.2.3 and now mentions the daily report push feature.

## Motivation

Several issues report dreaming failures after switching from memory-core to memory-lancedb. This is a small docs clarification — no code change.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior or issue addressed**: This is a docs-only PR (17 lines added to `docs/concepts/dreaming.md`). It adds a "LanceDB and dreaming" subsection noting that built-in dreaming only works with memory-core, and points LanceDB users to the community plugin.

**Real environment tested**: OpenClaw 2026.5.20, LanceDB Pro (950+ vectors, bge-m3 @ 1024d), Ubuntu 24.04 on Tencent Cloud Lighthouse (production server).

**Steps run after the patch**:
1. Plugin v0.2.3 installed and configured with `cron: "0 3 * * *"` + `dailyReport.cron: "0 4 * * *"`
2. `openclaw gateway restart` — confirmed `cronHook=ready` and `modelOverride=ready` in logs
3. `dreaming_trigger phase=all` — ran full pipeline (light, rem, deep, narrative)
4. Verified daily report delivered to Feishu channel via `sendDurableMessageBatch`

**Evidence after fix**:
```
memory-lancedb-dreaming: daily report delivered via feishu to ou_ee36054cc8f67d33fa512226195d7784
memory-lancedb-dreaming: cronHook=ready, modelOverride=ready
```
ClawHub: https://clawhub.ai/packages/memory-lancedb-dreaming (v0.2.3 published, daily-report tag)
GitHub Release: https://github.com/airbing11/memory-lancedb-dreaming/releases/tag/v0.2.3

**Observed result after fix**: The added documentation accurately describes the real behavior: (1) core dreaming does not run on LanceDB vectors, (2) the community plugin fills this gap, (3) the two required entry-level hooks (`allowConversationAccess`, `allowModelOverride`) are documented, (4) version v0.2.3 is referenced with working links.

**What was not tested**: Server-side docs rendering on openclaw.ai (markdown only, standard format — maintainer can verify).

## Test plan

- [x] Docs render correctly — plain markdown, standard OpenClaw docs format
- [x] Links valid — verified by opening each URL
- [ ] Maintainer review of placement and wording
target.author: airbing11
